title: Rules and regulations
doc_html:
§1326.  Rules and regulations

The commission shall establish policies, rules, and regulations for the operation of the commission in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act.

Acts 2013, No. 128, §1.

§1326.  Rules and regulations

Acts 2013, No. 128, §1.
